rag_rules: Repair only invalid AGREE clauses that violate scope or type rules; preserve all AADL structure.
Delete clauses with unresolved identifiers rather than inventing declarations or modifying architecture.
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features (ports, subcomponents, data types) in AGREE expressions.
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes; use type annexes only for visible contract relations.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE scalar types: int, real, bool — never use 'integer' or 'boolean'.
Assignments (assign) are valid in implementation scope only for outputs or declared auxiliaries.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as AGREE variables.
Never encode event ports as numeric or Boolean values unless explicitly typed as data ports.
irrelevant_topics: parsing Package_Specification, Empty packages are not allowed
